name: Diamond Broken-Lost Report
query:
SELECT
    emp.employee_name AS 'Employee',

    /* Broken WT */
    IFNULL(SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN mbld.loss_type = 'Broken'
            THEN mbld.proportionally_loss
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS 'Broken Wt',

    /* Broken PCS */
    IFNULL(SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN mbld.loss_type = 'Broken'
            THEN mbld.pcs
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS 'Broken Pcs',

    /* Broken Amount */
    IFNULL(SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN mbld.loss_type = 'Broken'
            THEN mbld.net_weight * IFNULL(dr.diamond_rate, 0)
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS 'Broken Amt',

    /* Lost WT */
    IFNULL(SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN mbld.loss_type = 'Loss'
            THEN mbld.proportionally_loss
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS 'Lost Wt',

    /* Lost PCS */
    IFNULL(SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN mbld.loss_type = 'Loss'
            THEN mbld.pcs
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS 'Lost Pcs',

    /* Lost Amount */
    IFNULL(SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN mbld.loss_type = 'Loss'
            THEN mbld.net_weight * IFNULL(dr.diamond_rate, 0)
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS 'Lost Amt',

    /* Total WT */
    IFNULL(SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN mbld.loss_type IN ('Broken', 'Loss')
            THEN mbld.proportionally_loss
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS 'Total Wt',

    /* Total PCS */
    IFNULL(SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN mbld.loss_type IN ('Broken', 'Loss')
            THEN mbld.pcs
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS 'Total Pcs',

    /* Total Amount */
    IFNULL(SUM(
        CASE
            WHEN mbld.loss_type IN ('Broken', 'Loss')
            THEN mbld.net_weight * IFNULL(dr.diamond_rate, 0)
            ELSE 0
        END
    ), 0) AS 'Total Amt',

    dop.department AS 'Lost Department'

FROM `tabEmployee IR` eir

LEFT JOIN `tabEmployee` emp
    ON emp.name = eir.employee

LEFT JOIN `tabManually Book Loss Details` mbld
    ON mbld.parent = eir.name

LEFT JOIN `tabDepartment Operation` dop
    ON dop.operation = eir.operation

LEFT JOIN `tabEmployee IR Operation` eiro
    ON eiro.parent = eir.name

LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        manufacturing_operation,
        MAX(basic_rate) AS diamond_rate
    FROM `tabMOP Balance Table`
    WHERE item_code LIKE 'D-%%'
    GROUP BY manufacturing_operation
) dr
    ON dr.manufacturing_operation = eiro.manufacturing_operation

WHERE eir.docstatus = 1

GROUP BY
    emp.employee_name,
    dop.department

ORDER BY
    emp.employee_name;

roles.role: Computer Aided Designing – South Zone Manager - MUM
Computer Aided Designing – PAN India Manager - MUM
